name: bemoat-web-starter
description: A blank template to get started with Payload 3.0

scripts.build:next: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" pnpm exec next build
scripts.build:cloudflare: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--no-deprecation --max-old-space-size=8000" pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare build ${CLOUDFLARE_ENV:+--env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV}
scripts.check: pnpm run guard:safety && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test:int
scripts.check:full: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
scripts.deploy: pnpm run guard:cloudflare-env && pnpm run deploy:database && pnpm run deploy:app
scripts.deploy:app: pnpm run build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare deploy ${CLOUDFLARE_ENV:+--env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV}
scripts.deploy:database: cross-env NODE_ENV=production PAYLOAD_SECRET=ignore pnpm exec payload migrate && pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute D1 --command 'PRAGMA optimize' ${CLOUDFLARE_ENV:+--env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV} --remote
scripts.deploy:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=production CLOUDFLARE_ENV=dev pnpm run deploy
scripts.devsafe: rm -rf .next && rm -rf .open-next && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation next dev
scripts.generate:types: pnpm run generate:types:cloudflare && pnpm run generate:types:payload
scripts.preview: pnpm run guard:cloudflare-env && pnpm run build && pnpm exec opennextjs-cloudflare preview ${CLOUDFLARE_ENV:+--env=$CLOUDFLARE_ENV}
scripts.test: pnpm run test:int && pnpm run test:e2e
scripts.bemoat:check: pnpm run bemoat:guard:safety && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run bemoat:test:int

PAYLOAD_SECRET.description: Generate a random string using `openssl rand -hex 32`
